<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Create GitHub Release<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Create a GitHub release with pinned softprops/action-gh-release, or report a dry run.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                      | Description                                                  | Required | Default |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|----------|---------|
| `tag-name`                | Release tag name.                                            | `true`   | ` `     |
| `release-name`            | GitHub release name. Defaults to tag-name.                   | `false`  | ` `     |
| `body-path`               | Path to release notes.                                       | `true`   | ` `     |
| `files`                   | Newline-delimited release asset paths.                       | `false`  | ` `     |
| `draft`                   | Create a draft release.                                      | `false`  | `false` |
| `prerelease`              | Create a prerelease.                                         | `false`  | `false` |
| `fail-on-unmatched-files` | Fail when any configured asset path does not match a file.   | `false`  | `true`  |
| `generate-release-notes`  | Ask GitHub to generate release notes.                        | `false`  | `false` |
| `overwrite-files`         | Overwrite release assets with matching names.                | `false`  | `true`  |
| `dry-run`                 | Report the release inputs without creating a GitHub release. | `false`  | `false` |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/create-github-release" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Create GitHub release"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/create-github-release@main"
   with:
    body-path: "temp/release-notes.md"
    files: |
     ${{ steps.release_assets.outputs.tarball_path }}
     ${{ steps.release_assets.outputs.zip_path }}
    release-name: "${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}"
    tag-name: "${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}"
   env:
    GITHUB_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
